### Pull Request Checklist

I have included:
- [ ] app name
- [ ] appropriate category (see "legend")
- [ ] link to the app and, if applicable, link to a source code repository 
- [ ] platform(s)
- [ ] short description

Placement:
- [ ] listed under appropriate social media platform(s) 
- [ ] placement maintains numbering and alphabetical order by app name

Complete all of the above to have your PR approved.
